name: Here's My Heart Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 2/3 cups Hershey's Premier White Chocolate Chips (10-oz. package, divided)
1/2 cup Hershey's Cocoa or Hershey's European Style Cocoa
A few drops Red Food Coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 13x9x2-inch pan with foil.
2. In a medium bowl, combine 1 cup white chocolate chips and almond extract.
3. In a second medium bowl, stir together cocoa, melted butter, and vanilla extract until smooth; add the remaining 2/3 cup white chocolate chips (chips do not need to melt).
4. In a heavy 4-quart saucepan, stir together sugar, marshmallow creme, evaporated milk, and 1/4 cup butter. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches a full rolling boil (bubbles cannot be stirred down); continue boiling and stirring for an additional 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
5. Add half of the hot mixture to the bowl with white chocolate chips only. Pour the remainder into the cocoa mixture; stir to blend.
6. Beat the white chocolate chip mixture until the chips are completely melted; stir in red food coloring, if desired, and cherries. Spread evenly in the prepared pan.
7. Beat the cocoa mixture until the chips are melted and the mixture thickens slightly. Spread evenly over the top of the white layer. Cover; refrigerate until firm. Remove from the pan; peel off the foil. Cut with heart-shaped cookie cutters or into squares. Store covered in the refrigerator. Approximately 8 dozen squares.
NOTE: For best results, do not double this recipe. Hershey's is a registered trademark of Hershey Foods Corporation. Recipe may be reprinted courtesy of the Hershey Kitchens.
